summary: Iteration 285 - EnlightenmentOS Page Testing at /sovereignty route. ALL FEATURES WORKING: Page loads with data-testid='enlightenment-os', Three.js crystalline visualization renders (icosahedron wireframe with particles), Top strip shows VOID/SOVEREIGN_DIRECTOR/KARMA labels, Quick action buttons (SANCTUARY, MEMBERSHIP, ORACLE, JOURNAL) all clickable and navigate correctly, COSMOS_AI_ACTIVE portal with 3 pulse rings animation, Bottom rubber band utility bar expands on hover with HUB/ETHER/LOOM/DOME/EXIT navigation, HRTF audio indicator appears on click. KNOWN ISSUE: 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React context loop errors persist but do not prevent functionality.

integration_issues.issue: KNOWN PRE-EXISTING ISSUE - Hundreds of errors logged but does not prevent functionality
integration_issues.details: As noted by main agent, this is a known pre-existing issue (P1 from handoff). The UI remains functional despite these errors.

critical_code_review_comments: EnlightenmentOS.js: Well-structured component with proper Three.js cleanup in useEffect return
EnlightenmentOS.js: Audio context initialization correctly uses useCallback and handles suspended state
EnlightenmentOS.js: All quick action buttons have proper data-testid attributes for testing
EnlightenmentOS.js: Rubber band utility bar uses CSS transitions for smooth expand/collapse animation
context_for_next_testing_agent: EnlightenmentOS page at /sovereignty route fully tested and working. All quick action buttons navigate correctly: SANCTUARY→/sanctuary, MEMBERSHIP→/membership, ORACLE→/oracle, JOURNAL→/journal. Bottom rubber band utility bar expands on hover with HUB/ETHER/LOOM/DOME/EXIT navigation. Three.js visualization renders crystalline icosahedron wireframe with particle field. HRTF audio indicator appears after user click. The 'Maximum update depth exceeded' errors are a KNOWN PRE-EXISTING issue that does not prevent functionality.
